<Column>
  <Text variant="heading">订单状态</Text>
  <Row>
    <Badge variant="success">✓</Badge>
    <Text variant="body">已下单</Text>
  </Row>
  <Row>
    <Badge variant="success">✓</Badge>
    <Text variant="body">已确认</Text>
  </Row>
  <Row>
    <Badge variant="warning">●</Badge>
    <Text variant="body">配送中</Text>
  </Row>
  <Row>
    <Badge variant="info">○</Badge>
    <Text variant="body">已完成</Text>
  </Row>
  <Button variant="primary" onTap="viewDetail">查看详情</Button>
</Column>
